title: WD3 9SQ, Biffa Waste Services Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/XP3705MV/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Biffa Waste Services Limited Installation name: Maple Lodge Wastewater Treatment Works Permit number: EPR/XP3705MV  "
